etymology.description: phonetic 分 (fēn) + semantic 邑 (yì, "city") -> denotes an ancient city name
etymology.interpretation: The character 邠 represents an ancient place name, created by combining the phonetic component 分 (fēn) with the semantic component 邑 (yì, "city"). 邑 indicates the connection to a location or settlement, while 分 provides the pronunciation.
